children.heading: Relation to other appropriations
children.label: a Relation to other appropriations
children.text: Funds made available under and funds made available to a Secretary concerned under shall be in addition to any other annual appropriations for the Forest Service and the Bureau of Land Management.section 7152 of this titlesection 7126 of this title

children.heading: Deposit of revenues and other funds
children.label: b Deposit of revenues and other funds
children.text: All revenues generated from projects pursuant to subchapter II, including any interest accrued from the revenues, shall be deposited in the Treasury of the United States.
